title: 6 du and sort Commands for Faster Large Folder Cleanup
summary: Find space-heavy folders faster with du and sort commands for directory ranking, top-N cleanup candidates, and quick storage triage.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with du and sort

verification_setup: Confirm du and sort are installed.
Replace the example paths before running the commands.
Use directories that contain files or subfolders with meaningful size differences.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/du_and_sort_commands_for_faster_large_folder_cleanup.sh with real local directories.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally against disposable directories with known size differences. Replace the example paths to match folders on your machine.
